tips_en: Stay in backline, use range to poke
Thunder Unite Move chains with Energy Amplifier for huge burst
Use Eject Button to reposition out of dives
tips_es: Quedate en backline, usa el rango para hostigar
El movimiento Unite Trueno encadena con Amplificador para burst enorme
Usa Boton Eyectar para reposicionarte de los dives

tips_en: Farm Aipom/Corphish for Attack Weight stacks before scoring
Power-up at lv 7/9 (Mega Evolution)
Flare Blitz resets on KO - chain into enemy team
tips_es: Farmea Aipom/Corphish para acumular Peso de Ataque antes de anotar
Power-up en lv 7/9 (Mega Evolucion)
Envite Igneo se reinicia al eliminar - encadena en el equipo enemigo

tips_en: You outrange most melees - abuse it
Surf + Hydro Pump combo deletes Attackers
Buddy Barrier on Unite Move gives you and ally huge shields
tips_es: Tenes mas rango que la mayoria de melees - abusalo
La combo Surf + Hidrobomba borra Atacantes
Barrera de Companero en Unite te da escudos enormes a vos y aliado

tips_en: Razor Leaf shreds tanks; Sludge Bomb has more burst
Verdant Anger is a zoning tool, not an execute
Slick Spoon vs. Assault Vest users
tips_es: Hoja Afilada destroza tanques; Bomba Lodo tiene mas burst
Ira Verde es control de zona, no ejecucion
Cuchara Resbaladiza vs. usuarios de Chaleco de Asalto

tips_en: Water Shuriken boosted attacks are your main damage
Smokescreen is an escape - use for survival, not initiation
Surf for mobility and engage
tips_es: Los ataques potenciados de Shuriken de Agua son tu danio principal
Pantalla de Humo es escape - usalo para sobrevivir, no iniciar
Surf para movilidad y engage

tips_en: Blaze Kick is your main damage and reposition
Feint dodges abilities - use to bait enemy skills
Unite Move chains into whole teams if aimed right
tips_es: Patada Ignea es tu danio principal y reposicionamiento
Finta esquiva habilidades - usala para baitear skills enemigas
El Unite encadena en equipos enteros si apuntas bien

tips_en: Barrier blocks enemy dashes and skills - use to peel for carries
Guard Swap gives invuln to ally - use before they die
You are a SUPPORT - score rarely, peel always
tips_es: Barrera bloquea dashes y skills - usala para peelear carries
Intercambio Guardia da invuln a aliado - usalo antes que muera
Sos SOPORTE - anota poco, pelea mucho

tips_en: Dive is a long-range engage - aim at backline
Gatling Gulp Missile's slow is huge for picks
Stay mid-back, not frontline
tips_es: Zambullida es engage de largo rango - apunto a la backline
El slow de Misil Gulp es enorme para picks
Quedate medio-atras, no en frente

tips_en: You are the wall - position between enemy and your carries
Yawn is a team-fight setup, not a 1v1 tool
Block gives 2 allies 100% HP shields - huge plays
tips_es: Sos el muro - posicional entre enemigo y tus carries
Bostezo es setup de team fight, no herramienta 1v1
Bloqueo da escudos del 100% HP a 2 aliados - jugadas enormes

tips_en: Stack Attack Weight by farming jungle, then score ASAP
Power-Up Punch gets stronger the longer you fight
Extreme Speed gives you mobility and a true single-target execute
tips_es: Acumula Peso de Ataque farmeando jungla, despues anota ASAP
Puño Potenciado es mas fuerte mientras mas peleas
Velocidad Extrema te da movilidad y un execute single-target

tips_en: Wait for enemy to overextend, then gank
Shadow Ball + Dream Eater combo deletes squishies
You are squishy - one-shot or die
tips_es: Espera a que el enemigo se extienda, despues gankeas
Bola Sombra + Come Suenos borra fragiles
Sos fragil - one-shot o mori

tips_en: Crit-stacking build - hit crits hard
Midnight Slash is a team-wipe tool, aim for groups
Sucker Punch is a hard engage - pair with Speedster allies
tips_es: Build de crit-stack - tus criticos pegan duro
Tajo Medianoche es herramienta de team-wipe, apunto a grupos
Golpe Bajo es engage fuerte - combinalo con aliados velocistas

tips_en: Stay in the air - your mobility is your identity
Brave Bird is an execute - aim at low-HP targets
Don't dive 1v5 - you are not a tank
tips_es: Quedate en el aire - tu movilidad es tu identidad
Pajaro Bravo es execute - apunto a bajo HP
No divees 1v5 - no sos tanque

tips_en: You are the king of objective snipes - steal Zapdos/Drednaw
Spark is your main engage and escape
Plasma Gale chains into allies' CC for clean wipes
tips_es: Sos el rey de los snipes de objetivo - roba Zapdos/Drednaw
Chispa es tu engage y escape principal
Vendaval Plasma encadena con CC aliado para wipes limpios

tips_en: Dynamic Punch is an AoE - use in minion waves for stacked damage
You are tanky but not immortal - don't tower-dive alone
Cross Chop is your single-target execute
tips_es: Dinamopunio es AoE - usalo en oleadas de minions para danio apilado
Sos tanke pero no inmortal - no divees torres solo
Corte Cruzado es tu execute single-target

tips_en: Ice Fang slows + Earthquake is a CC chain
Your Unite Move is a team-fight setup - use when allies are close
You are the slowest Defender - use it as a frontline
tips_es: Colmillo Hielo ralentiza + Terremoto es cadena de CC
Tu Unite es setup de team fight - usalo cuando aliados estan cerca
Sos el Defensor mas lento - usalo como frontline

tips_en: Anti-stun build - you are immune to CC for a long time
Stomp resets on KO - chain into carries
Triple Axel is your mobility + execute
tips_es: Build anti-stun - sos inmune a CC por largo tiempo
Pison se reinicia al eliminar - encadena en carries
Triple Axel es tu movilidad + execute

tips_en: Charging Charm build - late game monster
Hyper Beam is a channel - protect yourself during it
Draco Impact is huge AoE for team fights
tips_es: Build de Encanto Cargador - monstruo de late game
Hiperrayo es canalizacion - protegete mientras
Impacto Draco es AoE enorme para team fights

tips_en: Sand Tomb zones enemies off objectives
Stone Edge is your big burst - combo after Bite slow
You scale with HP, not Attack - use Rocky Helmet
tips_es: Tumba Arena zonea enemigos de objetivos
Canto Rocoso es tu burst grande - combo tras slow de Mordisco
Escalas con HP, no Ataque - usa Casco Rocoso

tips_en: Curse lets you tank insane damage - combine with Focus Band
Wood Hammer is a hard engage - chain with slow skills
Phantom Forest is a team-wipe setup, not a damage tool
tips_es: Maldicion te deja tanquear danio insano - combinalo con Banda Focus
Mazazo Leñoso es engage duro - encadena con skills de slow
Bosque Fantasma es setup de team-wipe, no herramienta de danio

tips_en: Sing wins team fights - aim at grouped enemies
Dazzling Gleam shreds grouped enemies
You are squishy - stay behind tanks
tips_es: Canto gana team fights - apuntalo a enemigos agrupados
Resplandor destroza enemigos agrupados
Sos fragil - quedate detras de tanques

tips_en: Soft-Boiled is your main healing - use on lowest-HP ally
Helping Hand gives attack speed to allies - use before they dive
Stay near your carry at all times
tips_es: Huevo Sancochado es tu sanacion principal - usala en aliado con menos HP
Mano Amiga da velocidad de ataque a aliados - usala antes de que diveen
Quedate cerca de tu carry siempre
beats_en: Allies stay alive longer, score more
beats_es: Los aliados viven mas, anotan mas

tips_en: Cotton Spore gives movement speed to allies - use to engage
Pollen Puff heals or damages - aim at enemies in fights, allies when safe
You are the meta support - play safe, score less, peel more
tips_es: Espora Algodon da velocidad de movimiento a aliados - usala para engage
Bola de Polen sana o dana - apunto a enemigos en peleas, aliados cuando seguro
Sos el soporte meta - juega seguro, anota menos, pelea mas

tips_en: Aqua Tail is your AOE engage - chain with basic attacks
Play Rough stuns - use to peel or pick
Stack Attack Weight for huge late-game scaling
tips_es: Cola Aqua es tu engage AoE - encadena con ataques basicos
Carantoñas aturde - usala para peelear o pickear
Acumula Peso de Ataque para escalado enorme en late

tips_en: Calm Mind stacks Sp. Atk - use before big fights
Hyper Voice is a long-range zone control
You are squishy - position safely
tips_es: Calma apila Atq. Esp. - usala antes de peleas grandes
Voz Fuerte es control de zona de largo alcance
Sos fragil - posicional segura

tips_en: Disguise is your survival tool - one free hit per engage
Shadow Sneak is a long-range engage - chain with Shadow Claw
You are slippery - use that to score and escape
tips_es: Disfraz es tu herramienta de supervivencia - un golpe gratis por engage
Sombra Furtiva es engage de largo alcance - encadena con Garra Sombra
Sos resbaladizo - usalo para anotar y escapar

tips_en: Knock Off steals items - use on enemy carries
Confuse Ray wins 1v1s and team fights
You are a jungler that counters other junglers
tips_es: Desarme roba items - usalo en carries enemigos
Rayo Confuso gana 1v1s y team fights
Sos jungler que counterea a otros junglers

tips_en: Iron Defense gives you a shield - use to survive dives
Flash Cannon is a long-range burst - chain with autos
You are a hybrid attacker/all-rounder - flexible
tips_es: Defensa Ferrea te da escudo - usala para sobrevivir dives
Cannon Flash es burst de largo alcance - encadena con autos
Sos atacante/all-rounder hibrido - flexible

tips_en: Drain Crown is core - you sustain in long fights
Superpower has a 50% damage penalty on hit, but it's AoE
Smack Down gives slow - chain with Superpower
tips_es: Corona Drenante es core - tenes sustain en peleas largas
Superpoder tiene penalidad del 50% de danio al pegar, pero es AoE
Castigo da slow - encadena con Superpoder
